summary: Completed comprehensive testing of webhook delivery persistence to MongoDB. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed - stats, delivery history, and test webhook functionality all working correctly with MongoDB persistence.
critical_code_review_comments: Webhook delivery persistence to MongoDB is fully implemented and working
Stats (total_deliveries, successful, failed, success_rate) are calculated from webhook_deliveries collection
Delivery history is fetched from MongoDB with proper sorting (newest first)
Test webhook endpoint persists deliveries to database correctly
set_db_interface is called during startup to wire WebhookManager to MongoDB
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Used existing Slack webhook (ID: 6e99bb58-d411-4e23-95f1-22d1aaa6e8d6) and existing delivery records in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Webhook delivery persistence to MongoDB is fully tested and working. The webhook_deliveries collection now has 6+ records. Stats are calculated from database. Key endpoints tested: GET /api/webhooks (returns DB-based stats), POST /api/webhooks/{id}/test (persists delivery to MongoDB), GET /api/webhooks/delivery-history (returns deliveries from MongoDB). Frontend Webhooks page displays stats, registered webhooks, and delivery history correctly.

webhook_delivery_persistence.get_webhooks_returns_db_stats: PASS - Stats (total_deliveries, successful, failed, success_rate) calculated from MongoDB
webhook_delivery_persistence.get_delivery_history_from_mongodb: PASS - Delivery history fetched from webhook_deliveries collection
webhook_delivery_persistence.test_webhook_persists_delivery: PASS - Test webhook sends HTTP POST and persists delivery to MongoDB
webhook_delivery_persistence.stats_calculated_from_database: PASS - Stats are consistent between endpoints and calculated from DB
webhook_delivery_persistence.delivery_history_sorted: PASS - Deliveries sorted by created_at descending (newest first)
webhook_delivery_persistence.limit_parameter_works: PASS - Limit parameter correctly limits returned deliveries

frontend_webhooks_page.stats_section: PASS - Shows Registered: 1, Enabled: 1, Deliveries: 6, Success Rate: 100%
frontend_webhooks_page.webhooks_list: PASS - Shows Production Security Alerts with ACTIVE status
frontend_webhooks_page.delivery_history: PASS - Shows recent deliveries with event types and HTTP 200 codes
frontend_webhooks_page.test_button: PASS - Clicking Test button sends webhook and updates delivery count
frontend_webhooks_page.expanded_view: PASS - Shows subscribed events and delivery/failure counts

mongodb_collections_used.webhook_deliveries: Stores delivery records with id, webhook_id, webhook_name, event_type, destination, status, created_at, delivered_at, response_code, error, retries

mocked_services_note: Trivy scanning, Docker builds, Cosign signing are simulated. Actual Slack webhook delivery is REAL and working with HTTP 200 responses.
